narrative:
Precinct Dover 2-A (precinct in Tuscarawas County) has 654 registered voters, with 55.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.2%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.5 percentage points.
